case_title: CACH, LLC VS. DREW F HENWOOD et al

docket_entries.description: CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-11-2014 CONTINUED TO MAY-06-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HENWOOD, DREW F DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-24-2012
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-16-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-03-2013, SPECIAL APPEARANCE BY COUNSEL ELIZABETH MACDONALD FOR PLAINTIFF AND SELF-REPRESENTED DEFENDANT. AFTER PARTIES MET IN THE HALLWAY TO DISCUSS SETTLEMENT, THE CASE WAS CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON OCT-28-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN 206 PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. PARTIES WILL DISCUSS FURTHER SETTLEMENT AND HAVE WITNESS APPEAR. NOTICE WAS WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. (206)

MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-28-2013 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON JAN-27-2014 AT 9:30 AM IN 206 DUE TO UNAVAILABILITY OF PLAINTIFF'S WITNESS AND PER AGREEMENT OF ALL PARTIES. NOTICE IS WAIVED. JUDGE: MARY WISS; CLERK: EBURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
